# Agentify

> Agent Interface Compiler — One command. Every agent speaks your product.

Agentify transforms OpenAPI specifications into agent interface formats with a single command. Currently generates MCP Servers with security scanning; additional formats are planned.

## Quick Start

```bash
npx agentify-cli transform https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/swagger.json
```

## Key Features

- OpenAPI 3.x / Swagger 2.0 parsing with input sanitization
- MCP Server generation with security scanning
- Tiered generation strategy: small (<30 endpoints), medium (30-100), large (100+)
- Context-window aware: avoids the "93 tools = 55K tokens" problem

## Output Formats

- MCP Server: Model Context Protocol server with tools, handlers, and Dockerfile (Available)
- CLAUDE.md: Project context for Claude Code (Planned)
- AGENTS.md: Universal agent instructions (Planned)
- .cursorrules: Cursor IDE agent rules (Planned)
- Skills: Agent instruction files for 30+ platforms (Planned)
- llms.txt: LLM-readable documentation (Planned)
- A2A Card: Google Agent-to-Agent protocol discovery card (Planned)

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/koriyoshi2041/agentify
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/agentify-cli
